name: MHA / BNHA - Dorm (1A - 1B) / Classroom (1A - 1B) / L.O.V. Starter (My Hero Academia - Boku No Hero Academia - Lorebook Active)
description:
(Warning: Proxy with High Memory Recommended) An MHA / BNHA RP Bot. Become a hero, student, teacher, villain—choice is yours. Featuring eight possible scenarios, all as follows:

Scenario 1 & 2: (S1—1A Dormitory, S2—1B Dormitory)

  • Early morning, 1A / 1B is preparing for another day in UA's dormitory, when they hear an unexpected knock on their door. Whether it be a student, a villain, a new teacher... The possibilities are endless so long as you knock

Scenario 3 & 4: (S3—1A Dormitory, S4—1B Dormitory)

  • Within the confines of their classroom—early in the morning—1A / 1B is goofing off again before classes begin. Their conversations, however, are cut short as Aizawa (Eraserhead) / Sekijiro (Vlad King) enter, bringing news about a new student...

Scenario 5: (League of Villains Bar)

  • The bar is uneventful, everyone is minding their own business, waiting, and taking a break before plotting their next step against heroes. After the arrest of Mustard, Moonfish, and Muscular, they're in dire need of a new break... Luckily, All for One has something in mind for them.

Scenario 6 & 7: (S6—1A Post Thug Takedown, S7—1B Post Thug Takedown)

  • UA decided to help expand their hero course students' field experience by having them assist in handling some small-time criminals or thugs when the opportunity arises (with their advisers present, of course). However, after taking down the thugs and handing them to the police... Something suddenly feels amiss... But what?

Scenario 8: (1A + 1B Post Thug Takedown)

  • Scenario 6 and Scenario 7 combined.

Scenario 9 (1A vs the League of Villains)

  • UA's 1A Class was just out on a field trip. They were passing through Kyoto before an unexpected attack emerged out of nowhere... Amidst their battle, you—the user—can either resume their battle unbothered, or join in yourselves as a villain or hero—and if you're creative enough—even as a UA student to be.
creator: MarchosiasHajiroboshi
